# Managing a Subscription

To manage your subscription at Acme Shop, you can pause, skip, or cancel it via the "My Subscriptions" section of your account. Pausing allows you to halt your subscription for up to three months if done at least 24 hours before the next billing cycle. Skipping a delivery keeps the subscription active while postponing the next delivery, which must be skipped at least 48 hours in advance. To cancel your subscription, you must also act 24 hours before the billing cycle, and any remaining deliveries will be honored unless a prorated refund is requested.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#managing-a-subscription]
